mechanics.text:
THE CLANS
Tral of Positlon The Tria of Position plays key role Clan society: testing warriors determine their position the Touman (the Clan armed forces). Every warrior undergoes at least one Trial of Position upon graduating from cadet training: Additional trials throughout warrior' career play major role in determining promotions and demotions Though the exact details vary among Clans cadet' = tial Trial of Position involves defeating opponents in deadly com bat: The cadet must defeat at least one warrior to gain warrior status_ The more enemies defeated; the higher the rank the new warror earns One victory grants warrior status the rank of Star Commander ad three the rank of Star Captain:
but Fare is the Trial of Annihilation_ the Clans ultimate punish ment Whenever an individual; unit Or even an entire Clan has been found   guilty grave crime: their fellow Clansmen attempt exterminate them through this trial; the guilty are lucky enough sur vive_ they are exonerated GOVERNMENT The warrior caste governs the Clans indirectly; through sev eral bodies and selected individuals_ Participation governing i5 restricted to Bloodnamed warriors thougn non Bloodnamed warriors may  Observe the   proceedings. The Bloodnamed each Clan gather in Clan Councils to decide matters by sim- ple majorty vote_ These Councils have near-absolute power over members 0l tneir Clans their actions subject t0 review by out- side bodies only when they affect the Clans as whole . In many cases however; the Clan Councils del egate nonmilitary matters t0 Civilian administrative bodies: Each Clan Council elects tWo of its members as Khans, wno serve a5 rulers of the Clan and as its representatives On the Grand Council Officially. these individuals are the Clan $ best warriors _ but practice the posts generally go to the most skilled politicians. Traditionally; the most senior Khan serves as head the Clan, overseeing relationships between castes and with other Clans The junior Khan called the saKhan; acts as the Clan'$ warlord_ The exact distribution these tasks depends the Clan and Khans in question The Khans of each Clan compose the Clan Grand Council, The Grand Council  meets when required to resolve disputes
Trlal of Bloodright Perhaps the most significant trial for warriors _ victory in Trial of Bloodright grants the right to use Bloodname and earns tne warrior  DNA place in the eugenics program. Unlike other trials which are generally fought between two groups, the Trial of Bloodright is competition among thirty-two warriors fought In several rounds.
Other trials and rituals The Clans engage in several esser Or more specialized rit- uals, which occur less trequently than those described above These include the Rite of Absorption , in which an entire Clan is swallowed up by another; and the Trial of Abjuration; which individuals or groups may be cast ut of the Clans; Well known
